recent: 把任务拆成更小的步骤，会让日常坚持变得更容易。	Breaking a task into smaller steps makes daily persistence easier.
Progress becomes stable when practice is regular.	练习规律时，进步才会稳定。
because	since；as；due to the fact that。
真正有效的方法，不是最复杂的方法，而是最能长期执行的方法。	A truly effective method is not the most complicated one, but the one you can carry out over the long run.
